title: activity — field classification
description: Activity rows may include PII via description + properties JSONB. HasActivityLog contracts require model authors to declare which fields to log; sensitive fields opt out via spatie's `logExcept`.

audit_log: Activity rows themselves function as an audit_log light-tier record.

notes: Activity.description may include user names / labels / entity titles. Confidential.
Activity.properties is spatie's arbitrary JSONB. Model authors MUST use spatie's `logExcept()` to prevent restricted-tier fields (device tokens, passwords, secrets) from ever landing here.
Model authors also MUST use spatie's `logOnly()` allow-list rather than log-everything by default.
